Header.title: Squat with Confidence
Header.paragraph: We're not strong because we have to be. We're strong because we choose to be.

About.paragraph: "We're not strong because we have to be. We're strong because we choose to be."
paragraphs: Squat with Confidence was born out of a love for the squat—and a love for what it represents: strength, resilience, and confidence built from the ground up.

Inspired by Sorinex’s Squatober, this bootcamp is more than just a workout. It’s a challenge—a month-long journey of squatting every weekday to grow powerful glutes, bulletproof your mindset, and test your limits.
Why Squat? 🍑 Build a bigger, stronger caboose; 💪 Develop quads that’ll make your ex jealous; 🧠 Gain mental toughness, discipline, and focus; 🫀 Improve longevity, mobility, and confidence
Whether you’re new to barbell training or ready to refine your technique, this experience is for anyone who wants to feel strong—not just look it.
"We're not strong because we have to be. We're strong because we choose to be."

Features.title: Confidence
Features.text: Let's build courage, control, and confidence under the bar — one rep at a time

Features.title: Injury Prevention
Features.text: Injuries suck. Let's help avoid them by fortifying our body with stability and mobility drills. As well as how to stay safe when there's hundreds of pounds on your back.

Features.title: Training Personalization & Check-ins
Features.text: Periodic check-ins on form and general wellness. In person coaching to receieve personalized modifications to the program to better suit your needs.

Features.title: Community
Features.text: Can't we all just get along, share a laugh, share a protein shake and joke about who lifted more today. Join a community where we hold each other accountable and congradulate each other on our wins
